languages.text: "Янур говорит, вы их видали уже. Сразу распознаете — длинная такая лиана, шипы на конце". {n}Полковник задирает рукав, демонстрируя несколько оплывших шрамов.{/n} "Раны оставляет страшные, кровью с такими истекаешь за пару минут. Тварь эта еще и свою присоску метнуть может. Зазевался, она все соки выжрала из тебя. Если хорошенько ее изрубите, постарается в корни нырнуть, чтобы уже в другом месте вырасти. Но и тут есть хитрость. Если огнем ее окатить, булава теряется и уже не убегает".

traits.locale_text: "Янур говорит, вы их видали уже. Сразу распознаете — длинная такая лиана, шипы на конце". {n}Полковник задирает рукав, демонстрируя несколько оплывших шрамов.{/n} "Раны оставляет страшные, кровью с такими истекаешь за пару минут. Шипы эта тварь еще и метнуть может. Высунулась, атаковала, а потом обратно в корни, чтобы уже в другом месте вырасти".

languages.text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long vine with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."
languages.original_text: "Янур говорит, вы их видали уже. Сразу распознаете — длинная такая лиана, шипы на конце". {n}Полковник задирает рукав, демонстрируя несколько оплывших шрамов.{/n} "Раны оставляет страшные, кровью с такими истекаешь за пару минут. Тварь эта еще и свою присоску метнуть может. Зазевался, она все соки выжрала из тебя. Если хорошенько ее изрубите, постарается в корни нырнуть, чтобы уже в другом месте вырасти. Но и тут есть хитрость. Если огнем ее окатить, булава теряется и уже не убегает".

traits.locale_text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise them at once, it's a long liana with thorns on the end." {n}The Colonel bares several gnarly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep; you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its edge and stays put."

"Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long liana with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."

"Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise them at once by the thorns on the end. Many Merovians have died because of them. They leave terrible wounds, and it's all too easy to bleed to death from one. And it's not just dangerous at close quarters — the maces can easily throw their thorns. You think that's the end of it? Ha, now! These maces are nimble, and they move like they've read the Tactica Imperialis. Strike and run. It pops up, attacks, and then it slithers back underground only to appear somewhere else."

But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its edge and stays put."

But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."

languages.text: 「ジャヌールが、もう見たって言っていたな。先端の棘で一目でわかる。奴らのせいで多くのメロヴィアンが死んだ。傷はひどく、そこからたやすく失血死に至る。間近だけの脅威じゃない――奴らは棘を遠くへも飛ばしてくる。それで終わりだと思うか？はは、甘いな。あいつらは身軽で、まるでタクティカ・インペリアリスでも読んだかのように動く。打っては退く。ひょいと現れて攻撃し、また地中へ滑り戻って、別の場所から顔を出すのさ」
languages.original_text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise them at once by the thorns on the end. Many Merovians have died because of them. They leave terrible wounds, and it's all too easy to bleed to death from one. And it's not just dangerous at close quarters — the maces can easily throw their thorns. You think that's the end of it? Ha, now! These maces are nimble, and they move like they've read the Tactica Imperialis. Strike and run. It pops up, attacks, and then it slithers back underground only to appear somewhere else."

traits.locale_text: ジャヌールが、もう見たって言っていたな。先端の棘で一目でわかる。奴らのせいで多くのメロヴィアンが死んだ。傷はひどく、そこからたやすく失血死に至る。間近だけの脅威じゃない――奴らは棘を遠くへも飛ばしてくる。それで終わりだと思うか？はは、甘いな。あいつらは身軽で、まるでタクティカ・インペリアリスでも読んだかのように動く。打っては退く。ひょいと現れて攻撃し、また地中へ滑り戻って、別の場所から顔を出すのさ。

languages.text: « Janur m'a dit que vous les aviez déjà vues. On les reconnaît facilement, ce sont de longues lianes couvertes d'épines à leurs extrémités. » {n}Le colonel découvre son bras, couturé de vilaines cicatrices.{/n} « Les entailles qu'elles infligent sont si profondes qu'on se vide de son sang en un clin d'œil. Mais la créature peut aussi vous cracher ses ventouses à la face... Un seul faux pas, et vous n'êtes plus qu'une carcasse desséchée. Si vous parvenez à tailler dans le gras, elle essaiera de replonger dans les racines pour ressurgir ailleurs. Cependant, il y a une astuce... Incendiez-la, et la masse tombera dans une sorte de léthargie. »
languages.original_text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long liana with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."

traits.locale_text: « Janur m'a dit que vous les aviez déjà vues. On les reconnaît facilement, ce sont de longues lianes couvertes d'épines à leurs extrémités. » {n}Le colonel découvre son bras, couturé de vilaines cicatrices.{/n} « Les entailles qu'elles infligent sont si profondes qu'on se vide de son sang en un clin d'œil. Mais la créature peut aussi vous cracher ses ventouses à la face... Un seul faux pas, et vous n'êtes plus qu'une carcasse desséchée. Si vous parvenez à tailler dans le gras, elle essaiera de replonger dans les racines pour ressurgir ailleurs. Cependant, il y a une astuce... Incendiez-la, et la masse tombera dans une sorte de léthargie. »

languages.text: "Janur bana onları gördüğünü söyledi. Hemen tanırsınız, ucunda dikenler olan uzun bir liyana." {n}Albay, kolundaki birkaç çirkin yara izini açığa çıkarıyor.{/n} "İnsanı derinlemesine deşer, gözünüzü kırpamadan kan kaybından can verirsiniz. Tek bir hatayla buruşuk bir kabuğa dönersiniz. İyice doğrayabilirseniz de başka bir yerde büyümek üzere köklerine dönmeye çalışır. Fakat bir zayıf nokta mevcut... Ateş püskürtürseniz gürzler cesaretini yitirip oldukları yerde kalakalır."
languages.original_text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long liana with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."

traits.locale_text: "Janur bana onları gördüğünü söyledi. Hemen tanırsınız, ucunda dikenler olan uzun bir liyana." {n}Albay, kolundaki birkaç çirkin yara izini açığa çıkarıyor.{/n} "İnsanı derinlemesine deşer, gözünüzü kırpamadan kan kaybından can verirsiniz. Tek bir hatayla buruşuk bir kabuğa dönersiniz. İyice doğrayabilirseniz de başka bir yerde büyümek üzere köklerine dönmeye çalışır. Fakat bir zayıf nokta mevcut... Ateş püskürtürseniz gürzler cesaretini yitirip oldukları yerde kalakalır."

languages.text: «Janur me ha dicho que ya las ha visto; se reconocen fácilmente, son como una liana muy larga con espinas en la punta». {n}El coronel te muestra unas feas cicatrices que tiene en el brazo.{/n} «Rajan que da gusto, en un abrir y cerrar de ojos acaba uno desangrado. La criatura también puede escupir su ventosa; como se descuide uno, acaba convertido en un cascarón reseco. Y si consigue hacerla pedazos, intentará refugiarse entre las raíces para volver a brotar en alguna otra parte. Pero conocemos un truco: lance un chorro de llamas, y la maza se encoge y se queda quieta».
languages.original_text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long liana with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."

traits.locale_text: «Janur me ha dicho que ya las ha visto; se reconocen fácilmente, son como una liana muy larga con espinas en la punta». {n}El coronel te muestra unas feas cicatrices que tiene en el brazo.{/n} «Rajan que da gusto, en un abrir y cerrar de ojos acaba uno desangrado. La criatura también puede escupir su ventosa; como se descuide uno, acaba convertido en un cascarón reseco. Y si consigue hacerla pedazos, intentará refugiarse entre las raíces para volver a brotar en alguna otra parte. Pero conocemos un truco: lance un chorro de llamas, y la maza se encoge y se queda quieta».

languages.text: “雅努尔跟我说您已经撞见过它们了。其实很好辨认，就是那种末端带刺的长藤蔓。”{n}上校露出手臂上几道丑陋的伤疤。{/n}“它会狠狠划伤您，眨眼间您就会失血而亡。那怪物还能把吸盘喷向您——稍微失误一下，您就会变成干尸。您要是能把它砍个稀烂，它会一头扎进根系里，换个地方再长。不过有个窍门——用火猛烧一下，藤锤就会吓破胆，不敢动弹了。”
languages.original_text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long liana with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."

traits.locale_text: “雅努尔跟我说您已经撞见过它们了。其实很好辨认，就是那种末端带刺的长藤蔓。”{n}上校露出手臂上几道丑陋的伤疤。{/n}“它会狠狠划伤您，眨眼间您就会失血而亡。那怪物还能把吸盘喷向您——稍微失误一下，您就会变成干尸。您要是能把它砍个稀烂，它会一头扎进根系里，换个地方再长。不过有个窍门——用火猛烧一下，藤锤就会吓破胆，不敢动弹了。”

languages.text: "Janur sagt, Ihr habt sie bereits gesehen. Ihr werdet sie sofort erkennen ... eine lange Liane mit Stacheln am Ende." {n}Den Arm des Colonels zieren einige hässliche Narben.{/n} "Die Kreatur fügt Euch tiefe Wunden zu. Ihr verblutet, ehe ihr zwinkern könnt. Außerdem kann sie Euch anspucken ... ein Fehler und Ihr seid nur noch eine schrumpelige Hülle. Gelingt es Euch, sie zu verletzen, zieht sie sich in die Wurzeln zurück und treibt woanders wieder aus. Es gibt allerdings einen Trick. Ein Feuerstoß reicht, um dem Spuk ein Ende zu machen."
languages.original_text: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long liana with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."

Ihr verblutet, ehe ihr zwinkern könnt. Außerdem kann sie Euch anspucken ... ein Fehler und Ihr seid nur noch eine schrumpelige Hülle. Gelingt es Euch, sie zu verletzen, zieht sie sich in die Wurzeln zurück und treibt woanders wieder aus. Es gibt allerdings einen Trick. Ein Feuerstoß reicht, um dem Spuk ein Ende zu machen."
